name: Platinum
description: Platinum is under investigation for the treatment of Metastatic Breast Cancer, Non-small Cell Lung Cancer, Gastric Large Cell Neuroendocrine Carcinoma, Colorectal Large Cell Neuroendocrine Carcinoma, and Pancreatic Large Cell Neuroendocrine Carcinoma, among others. Platinum has been investigated for the treatment and supportive care of Ovarian Cancer, Fallopian Tube Cancer, Peritoneal Primary Cancer, Non Small Cell Lung Cancer, and Primary Peritoneal Carcinoma, among others.
